name: Front/rear ladder bumper, drill-to-fit mount lugs
notes: Concept R00. Mount holes are pilot annulus guides; drill/ream for final bolts.

name: Universal Orange Pi / small SBC mount plate with standoff rings
notes: Measure the exact board before use. Designed as universal drill-to-fit R00, not a certified Orange Pi One hole pattern.

name: Generic front camera cradle / protective frame
notes: Use foam tape or small screws. Final camera dimensions must be measured and adjusted.

name: Cable comb guide for temporary harness routing
notes: Not waterproof by itself. Use inside covers or as a service loop guide.

name: V-shaped rice stalk guide for bench harvest test
recommended_material: PLA for desk / PETG for repeated test
notes: First geometry check. Edges should be sanded smooth to avoid snagging leaves.

name: Dual roller side frame with bearing ring guides
notes: Use 8mm shafts or adapt holes by drilling. This is a bench-test holder, not a field unit.

name: Cutter safety cover frame for bench test
notes: Use a clear acrylic/polycarbonate inspection plate if needed. Do not operate blades without a cover.

name: Downward straw discharge chute
notes: For desk tests only. Smooth surfaces reduce stem snagging.

name: Seedling tray rail section / concept holder
notes: Scale/section concept. Real seedling tray dimensions must be measured before final design.

name: Planting depth skid gauge concept
notes: Concept geometry. Test in a mud box before any field use.

name: Aze dock alignment funnel concept
notes: Bonus part. For dry dock alignment tests only, not an electrical charging connector.
